cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking why Americans don't take all their vacation days. The options are A, B, C, or D. Let me read through the text again to make sure I understand the reasons given. The first paragraph says that more than half don't take all their vacation days even though they think they need more holidays. Also, some check emails while on break. Samuel Nahmias mentions the US economic situation and unemployment rates. He says people with jobs are unwilling to take time off because of the high unemployment (9.6%). The text also compares to European countries where more vacation time is normal, but in the US, some have 6-10 days or less than 3 days. The workers who don't take time off mention too many responsibilities
